content.en:
"Shadow Stone is here, his aura seems to have weakened too much!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Under his investigation, Shadow Stone's current body was at most comparable to the late stage of the Yae Primordial Ancestor.

And the main power of the primordial antiquities was the body, not the immeasurable path, and they did not grasp the power of the immeasurable path.

Therefore, if the body becomes weaker, it means that the strength of the other party has really weakened, even if he has mastered the special secret technique, his true strength has definitely not reached the half-step ninefold ancestor realm.

"It seems that those Transformation-level Soul Splitting Red Beasts have really forced Shadow Stone into a desperate situation, causing him to not fall now, but it is almost like falling. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian chased after him.

......

"A Soul Splitting Red Beast from the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor?"

Shadow Stone found Ye Tian, and suddenly became a little dignified.

He immediately ran away, just to avoid Ye Tian.

Although the Soul Splitting Red Beast in the early stage of the Eightfold was very weak, he didn't want to fight any Soul Splitting Red Beast, after all, he couldn't fight for a long time now, and even a move would be a burden.

Besides, if he killed this Eightfold Early Stage Soul Splitting Red Beast and caused more Soul Splitting Red Beasts to be attracted, it wouldn't be good!

Shadowstone tried to avoid it, but he found that his speed was not as fast as the other party, and no matter how he changed direction and hidden, the other party still shuttled straight towards him.

"Damn, this guy definitely found me!"

Shadowstone Pathway.

In the blink of an eye, he was caught up by Ye Tian.

Seeing this, Shadow Stone decided to kill Ye Tian in one move and then be powerful.

Although he couldn't perform a few moves, he should not let his body collapse if he only used one move.

"Die!"

Shadow Stone made a move, and one hand grabbed it instantly, as if it was going to crush Ye Tian instantly.

However.

He was directly stunned the next moment.

I saw that the power of the immeasurable Dao Domain appeared on Ye Tian's body, directly making it difficult for Shadow Stone's arm to enter, and it continued to shatter.

"Infinite Dao Domain !!"

Shadow Stone couldn't believe it at all, wasn't this the means of the Ninefold Ancestor among the cultivators, why would an Eightfold Early Stage Soul Splitting Red Beast in the Forbidden Zone use the Infinite Dao Domain?

"Not good!"

Shadowstone shuddered.

I saw that Ye Tian used the power of the Infinite Dao to perform an Infinite Dao control technique, forming an endless golden spear that instantly penetrated.

Although the power that Ye Tian forcibly exerted with the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast was far inferior to the main body, it was enough to crush the ordinary Eightfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse.

At this time, Shadowstone couldn't withstand such an attack at all.

Burst!!!!

With a single blow, the shadow stone was directly pierced, and the body began to crumble.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was also a little surprised.

"Hey, this shadow stone is also a transformation-level peak powerhouse comparable to the peak of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, even if it is hit hard, and the body is only at the level of the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, it will not be blown up by me with one blow, is it so brittle?"

Ye Tian muttered.

The point is that after the other party was blown up, he didn't recover!

Click!!!

A cracking sound came.

Then, Ye Tian saw a fiery red stone, exuding a supreme aura.

"Eternal Flint!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised, and immediately grabbed this eternal flint stone, and then left this place.

......

"A trace of origin that is escaping!"

After Ye Tian carefully examined it, he infiltrated into the Eternal Flint with the power of the Immeasurable Dao, and sensed the origin of the Shadow Stone that was collapsing.

Soon, this trace of origin completely dissipated, representing the true fall of the Shadow Stone.

"So that's the case, the Shadow Stone originally fell, but the Eternal Fire Stone forcibly preserved a trace of his origin and kept him alive for the time being. And I just blew him up, so that his origin completely collapsed, and he can no longer exist!"

Ye Tian reasoned.

In other words, this eternal flint stone already belongs to him completely, and no one knows about it yet.

"Eternal flint is not easy to keep!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

The Soul Breaker Red Beast doesn't know the Eternal Flint Stone, so even if it senses, it won't go crazy to grab it.

But those Ninefold Ancestors on the Silent Black Sea can know the Eternal Flint Stone, once he takes it out and they sense the breath of the Eternal Flint Stone, he will not be able to keep the Eternal Flint Stone.

Faced with the temptation of achieving the strongest Ninefold Ancestor, I am afraid that even the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor will snatch it!

"The Eternal Flint must be kept in a safe place!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But where is it safe?

Soul Breaker Red Light Zone?

But it's not necessarily safe here, in case it is sensed by that group of transformation-level soul splitting red beasts, they are afraid that they will also take it to study and study, and they will not leave it to him.

Without thinking of a way, Ye Tian still hid the Eternal Fire Stone in the Soul Splitting Red Light area for the time being, but it would be placed in a remote place for the Soul Splitting Red Light.

In such a remote location, other Soul Breakers would not come, thus reducing the risk of exposure.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian was also inquiring about the information of the Eternal Firestone.

He wanted to learn more about the Eternal Fire Stone through the Nine-Story Building, so as to find a way to preserve the Eternal Fire.

However, according to the information from the Nine-Story Building, the Silent Black Sea did not know much about the Eternal Flint Stone, only that the Eternal Flint could not be stored in the spatial treasures.

It's like the Shadow Stone, the other party only inlays the Eternal Flint directly into the body, plus the Shadow Stone itself is a stone-like primordial antiquity, and the Eternal Flint is studied very deeply, so it can cover more than 99% of the breath of the Eternal Flint by relying on its own breath, leaving only a trace of the breath of the Eternal Flint Stone, and it is difficult to sigh the breath of the Eternal Flint if the strength is not strong.

And Ye Tian couldn't hide the aura of the Eternal Flint Stone, even if he could build a large array to cover the aura, but he couldn't arrange such a large array.

In addition, Ye Tian also found out a piece of news, that is, the Eternal Fire Stone could help the Ninefold Origin Ancestor or the Transformation Level powerhouse easily enter the flame area of the Forbidden Zone, and it could also conceal the aura.

Of course, Ye Tian would not think that this concealment was perfect, otherwise the shadow stone would not have escaped.

But it turns out that the use of the Eternal Fire Stone should be more than that, but the Nine Primordial Ancestors didn't do much research, or they didn't dare to study it indiscriminately.

It is true that the power contained in the Eternal Flint is very terrifying, even if other Dao Ancestors really obtain the Eternal Flint Stone, they will not dare to mess around, in case they let themselves be severely injured or fall, then they will not regret it.

"For the time being, you can study the Eternal Flint in the Soul Splitting Red Light area, and maybe you can find other uses for the Eternal Flint Stone!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

So, he copied the body of a Soul Splitting Red Beast and entered the area of the Soul Splitting Red Beast that cut off the forbidden area, so that even if one body fell during the research process, there would be no changes, and the other body could completely leave and hide with the Eternal Flint Stone.

In this way, Ye Tian began his own eternal flint research experiment.
